creator: Binhightower@aol.com
text:
Hope you can help. My new Altec Lansing ACS22 produce a cycling sound. I have 
 an old PC 133 & Win98. It sounds like the first syllable of a word or sound 
 gets cycled. The speakers are amplifiers and maybe that has something to do 
 with it.
 I would appeciate your input..........maybe I need a new driver for my Pro 
 Audio Spectrum 16 sound card.
 Don at finesse142@aol.com
